name: Miniature Shrimp Quiches
recipeInstructions:
PASTRY SHELLS:
1. Beat butter and cream cheese at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended.
2. Stir in flour and salt. Cover and chill for 1 hour.
3. Shape chilled dough into 1-inch balls.
4. Place each ball in an ungreased miniature muffin pan, shaping to form a shell.
QUICHE:
5. Combine shredded Swiss cheese, finely chopped cooked shrimp, chopped fresh chives, dried thyme with the egg mixture.
6. Spoon the egg mixture evenly into pastry shells.
7. Combine half-and-half, salt, pepper, and ground nutmeg in a separate bowl.
8. Pour the remaining ingredients mixture evenly into the pastry shells.
9. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes or until set.
